arts.ttl: New club in the mix to sign Marcus Rashford from Man United after admitting defeat on another deal
arts.sum: Napoli could reportedly now be in the mix for the potential transfer of Manchester United misfit Marcus Rashford this January. It looks highly likely that Rashford will be leaving Man Utd this month, with numerous top clubs around Europe linked with the England international in the last few weeks. arts.ttl: Milan Facing Stern Competition from German Powerhouse for Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: Bundesliga giants Borussia Dortmund are reportedly taking concrete steps to beat Milan and Barcelona to Marcus Rashford's signature. According to the Daily Mail, the Germans have identified the out-of-favor Manchester United forward as a perfect replacement for Donyell Malen. arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly considering a transfer swoop for Liverpool forward Luis Diaz as they look at multiple options in that area of the pitch. arts.ttl: Man Utd identify new wonderkid target
arts.sum: Should Man Utd decide to formalise their interest and actually make a move for Esposito, it would be a deal firmly in line with INEOS' new transfer policy. The 19-year-old's form has not gone unnoticed and journalist Alfredo Pedulla and Sportitalia report that the youngster has appeared on the radar of Premier League clubs Leicester and Man Utd .

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Bukayo Saka set target by Mikel Arteta after training ground return
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka is expected to be sidelined until March after undergoing hamstring surgery last month following Arsenal's 5-1 win at Crystal Palace
